description_en: Classic Ming dynasty yoke-back armchair (四出头官帽椅) with S-curved splat, protruding top rail resembling an official's hat, splayed legs with stretchers, and forward-protruding armrests supported by vertical front posts. Features minimal ornamentation and elegant proportions typical of scholarly furniture.

components.name: front_left_leg
components.description: Front left support post, square section, splayed outward
components.position_note: front left corner, extends from floor to seat frame underside

components.name: front_right_leg
components.description: Front right support post, square section, splayed outward
components.position_note: front right corner, extends from floor to seat frame underside

components.name: back_left_leg
components.description: Back left post extending full height from floor to top rail, continuous piece
components.position_note: back left corner, extends from floor to support top rail

components.name: back_right_leg
components.description: Back right post extending full height from floor to top rail, continuous piece
components.position_note: back right corner, extends from floor to support top rail

components.name: front_seat_rail
components.description: Front horizontal frame member of the seat
components.position_note: front edge between front legs, at 0.52m height

components.name: back_seat_rail
components.description: Back horizontal frame member of the seat
components.position_note: back edge between back legs, at 0.52m height

components.name: left_seat_rail
components.description: Left side horizontal frame member connecting front and back rails
components.position_note: left edge between front and back rails

components.name: right_seat_rail
components.description: Right side horizontal frame member connecting front and back rails
components.position_note: right edge between front and back rails

components.name: seat_panel
components.description: Wooden seat board set within the frame
components.position_note: inset within the four seat rails, forming sitting surface

components.name: back_splat
components.description: Central S-curved backrest panel (靠背板), thin vertical panel with elegant S-curve profile between seat and top rail
components.position_note: centered between back legs in the frontal plane, vertical panel connecting the center of back seat rail to the center of top rail between the back legs, tenoned into back legs

components.name: top_rail
components.description: Curved yoke-shaped top rail (搭脑) extending beyond back posts
components.position_note: across top of back legs, ends protrude backward like hat wings

components.name: left_gooseneck
components.description: Vertical front post (鹅脖) rising from front left leg to support left armrest
components.position_note: front left, rising vertically from front_left_leg at 0.52m to left_armrest at 0.72m

components.name: right_gooseneck
components.description: Vertical front post (鹅脖) rising from front right leg to support right armrest
components.position_note: front right, rising vertically from front_right_leg at 0.52m to right_armrest at 0.72m

components.name: left_armrest
components.description: Left armrest rail (扶手) extending from back post over gooseneck, protruding forward
components.position_note: left side, from back left leg at 0.72m height forward over left gooseneck, end protrudes beyond support

components.name: right_armrest
components.description: Right armrest rail (扶手) extending from back post over gooseneck, protruding forward
components.position_note: right side, from back right leg at 0.72m height forward over right gooseneck, end protrudes beyond support

components.name: front_apron
components.description: Curved apron board under front seat rail
components.position_note: between front seat rail and front legs, beaded edge, front face flush with leg front faces

components.name: left_apron
components.description: Left curved apron board under left seat rail
components.position_note: left side between left seat rail and legs, outer face flush with leg outer faces

components.name: right_apron
components.description: Right curved apron board under right seat rail
components.position_note: right side between right seat rail and legs, outer face flush with leg outer faces

components.name: front_stretcher
components.description: Front lower stretcher for footrest
components.position_note: between front legs, lowest position (~0.15m from floor)

components.name: back_stretcher
components.description: Back lower stretcher connecting back legs

components.description: Left stretcher connecting front and back legs
components.position_note: left side, middle height (~0.20m from floor)

components.name: right_stretcher
components.description: Right stretcher connecting front and back legs
components.position_note: right side, middle height (~0.20m from floor)

style_notes: Ming dynasty scholarly elegance with 'four protrusions' (四出头) where top rail ends extend backward and armrest ends extend forward beyond posts. Legs exhibit '侧脚' (splay) for stability. Back splat features classic vertical S-curve (cyma recta) profile for ergonomic support, rendered as a thin curved panel with refined edges, tenoned directly into back legs and rails. Armrests supported by vertical front posts (鹅脖) rising from front legs. Stretchers follow '步步高' (step-by-step rise) pattern: front lowest, sides middle, back highest. Simple beaded edges on aprons; minimal carving to emphasize wood grain and joinery. Wood: dense hardwood like huanghuali or walnut, warm amber-brown tone.
